finding_results.notes: Replaced the conflicting Arthur identity thread with a distinct depot character (Gerry Nolan), removed Arthur/billeting carryover cues, and removed next-day bus-route return language tied to Arthur.
finding_results.summary: Continuity conflict resolved by separating the meal guest from Arthur Hale/Pike canon and eliminating attached bus-shift implication.

finding_results.notes: Added embodied male fallout (Peter lip split/swelling; Tom knuckle lacerations with visible blood) and an explicit in-scene declaration that the gathering is over before cleanup begins.
finding_results.summary: Violence aftermath now lands physically and socially before logistics resume, preventing sanitization drift at the escalation peak.

finding_results.notes: Seeded delayed-arrival tension in advance (multiple mentions of viaduct/road hold-up) and made the confrontation produce an irreversible social break (declared end of the gathering) before the door knock.
finding_results.summary: Interruption no longer functions as the first release valve; a consequential rupture now lands before entry at the door.

summary: Revised chapter_03 addresses all packet findings by restoring causal payoff in the confrontation sequence, strengthening embodied and relational consequence before cleanup, and resolving the Arthur continuity contradiction while preserving chapter voice, heading contract, and continuity constraints.
